scripts.typecheck: pnpm run build && pnpm --recursive run typecheck
scripts.check: biome check packages/protocol/src packages/studio/src packages/studio/client packages/studio/tests packages/agent/src packages/agent/tests
scripts.check:fix: biome check --write packages/protocol/src packages/studio/src packages/studio/client packages/studio/tests packages/agent/src packages/agent/tests
scripts.test: pnpm run build && pnpm --recursive --if-present run test
scripts.ci:version: pnpm exec changeset version && pnpm install --lockfile-only
